sections.paragraph:
verb לבלות (>>לְבַלּוֹת)

to have fun, enjoy; spend time; wear out; outlive

verb לנבול

to wither, wilt, fade, decay

verb להתבלות

become worn out; grow old

verb הובל

be led away; transported; conveyed

verb לבלות (>>בילה)

to have fun, enjoy; spend time

adverb

not, do not
